name: Spinach-Artichoke Dip (Chicago Style)
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Can Artichoke Hearts, drained and rinsed, chopped
10 oz Pkg Chopped Spinach, thawed and drained well
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sour cream and 2 oz of parmesan cheese in a 2-quart casserole dish. Stir in spinach and artichokes. Mix well.
2. Cover top with Monterey Jack and the remaining 1 oz of parmesan cheese.
3. Bake for 15 minutes at 400°F. Then broil for about 5 minutes, or until cheese is golden brown.
4. Serve with tortilla chips and side dishes of sour cream and your favorite salsa.
